title: Database Management Systems & Java (JNTUK R20)
description: JNTUK R20 Year 2 Sem 2 — DBMS covering ER modelling, SQL, normalization, transactions, and concurrency; Java programming covering OOP, Collections, JDBC — aligned to JNTUK B.Tech CSE R20 syllabus.

modules.title: Getting Started
modules.description: Introduction and overview of Database Management Systems & Java (JNTUK R20)

pages.title: DBMS & Java — Course Overview
DBMS & Java — Wiki Index

modules.title: Core Lectures
modules.description: All lectures and concept pages for this course

pages.title: Introduction to DBMS: File System vs DBMS, Data Abstraction, DBMS Architecture
Entity-Relationship Model: Entities, Attributes, Relationships, ER Diagrams
Relational Model: Relations, Tuples, Keys, Integrity Constraints
SQL Fundamentals: DDL, DML, DCL, TCL — CREATE, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
Advanced SQL: Joins, Subqueries, Views, Indexes, Aggregate Functions
Normalization: 1NF, 2NF, 3NF, BCNF — Functional Dependencies and Decomposition
Transactions and Concurrency: ACID Properties, Isolation Levels, Deadlocks
Indexing and Hashing: B+ Tree Index, Dense vs Sparse, Hash Indexing
Java OOP Review: Classes, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Interfaces
Java Collections Framework: List, Set, Map, Queue, Comparable, Comparator
Java Exception Handling and File I/O: try-catch, BufferedReader, Scanner
JDBC: Connecting Java to MySQL — Statement, PreparedStatement, ResultSet

modules.title: Practice
modules.description: Practice, quizzes, coding, and project pages

pages.title: DBMS Lab: SQL Queries — DDL, DML, Joins, Subqueries on Student Database
Java Lab: OOP Programs — Student, Library, Banking System
DBMS MCQ Quiz: ER Model, SQL, Normalization — JNTUK Pattern
Placement Guide: DBMS and Java Interview Questions for JNTUK Students
